title: Keyboard Shortcut for Board Views
excerpt: Starting to explore the functionality of the Online Docs and really enjoying it. However, ss there a keyboard shortcut for the views in the board?

posts.author: mdnetti (Mark Netti)
posts.cookedHtml: Starting to explore the functionality of the Online Docs and really enjoying it. However, ss there a keyboard shortcut for the views in the board?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mdnetti! Thanks for posting!

There isn’t a keyboard shortcut to switch between board views at the moment, but this is a great idea! I’m going to pass it to my team as a feature request.

I will say we are looking into adding the option to set certain board views—such as the Online Docs view—as the default. Would that be helpful? Stay tuned!

In case there’s anything else we can help with, feel free to let us know!

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @TRB-monday.com any news on the keyboard shortcut for switching between board views? That would be awesome to work with. Thank you!

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Eltjo, not so far! I will make another note to the team—I agree that it would be really helpful.
